tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
chmod o-x /usr/bin/find /bin/find /usr/bin/tar  /bin/tar /usr/bin/curl /bin/curl && ls -l /usr/bin/find /bin/find /usr/bin/tar //bin/tar /usr/bin/curl /bin/curl
-rwxr-xr-- 1 root root 297288 Dec 11  2024 /bin/curl

-rwxr-xr-- 1 root root 432048 Apr  8  2024 /bin/tar

-rwxr-xr-- 1 root root 204264 Apr  8  2024 /usr/bin/find
